artifacts.summary: Root cause: skill-deck-plan lacks AskUserQuestion in allowed-tools; interactive questions are incorrectly placed in deck-planner-agent instead of skill layer. Fix: add AskUserQuestion to skill, move 4 interactive stages from agent to skill, pass selections to agent.
